summary: TI-003 Tenant Isolation Full Enforcement - All 66 tests passed (35 unit + 31 API). The TenantAwareDBProxy system correctly auto-injects tenant_id into MongoDB queries via contextvars middleware. All 3 layers verified: DB Proxy, Runtime Guard, Static Audit.
critical_code_review_comments: TenantAwareDBProxy correctly wraps _raw_db in core/database.py - all imports of 'db' get tenant scoping automatically
TenantContextMiddleware correctly extracts tenant_id from JWT and sets contextvars for each request
TenantScopedCollection properly injects tenant_id into all read/write operations and blocks cross-tenant access
LazyCollection descriptor in repositories resolves collection through proxy at access time, not import time
Global collections (tenants, system_config) correctly bypass tenant scoping
STRICT_TENANT_MODE env var controls whether unscoped access raises error (strict) or warns (soft mode)
Concurrent context safety verified - contextvars provide per-task isolation
Static audit via grep can detect raw db usage for CI enforcement
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo tenant data
context_for_next_testing_agent: TI-003 Tenant Isolation fully tested and working. Key verified features: (1) TenantContextMiddleware sets tenant_id from JWT for all authenticated endpoints. (2) TenantAwareDBProxy auto-injects tenant_id when context is set. (3) Cross-tenant read/write access blocked with TenantViolationError. (4) Global collections (tenants, system_config) NOT tenant-scoped. (5) API endpoints return tenant-scoped data. (6) Login/health endpoints work without tenant context. (7) LazyCollection descriptor in repositories resolves through proxy. Test files: test_tenant_isolation_enforcement.py (35 unit tests), test_tenant_isolation_api.py (31 API tests).

unit_tests_35_passed.TestTenantAwareDBProxy: 6 tests - proxy type, raw db, context behavior, global collections, passthrough
unit_tests_35_passed.TestTenantScopedCollection: 7 tests - filter injection, doc injection, cross-tenant blocking
unit_tests_35_passed.TestContextManagement: 3 tests - set/get/clear, context manager, nested context
unit_tests_35_passed.TestStrictMode: 2 tests - strict mode blocks, soft mode allows
unit_tests_35_passed.TestAggregateInjection: 2 tests - prepends match, injects into existing match
unit_tests_35_passed.TestStaticAudit: 2 tests - grep detection, repository LazyCollection usage
unit_tests_35_passed.TestTenantScopedDBEndToEnd: 3 tests - scoped collection, global collection, getitem

api_tests_31_passed.TestTenantIsolationAPI: 20 tests - login, health, dashboard, rooms, night-audit, bookings, guests, folios
api_tests_31_passed.TestCrossTenantAccessBlocking: 2 tests - cannot access other tenant guest/night-audit-run
